items.title: Are Weak Cash Flows Hinting at Deeper Challenges for monday.com?
items.description: Despite revenue growth, MNDY's weakening cash position threatens its flexibility in an increasingly competitive SaaS space.

items.title: ServiceNow Stock Wins Morgan Stanley Upgrade On Artificial Intelligence Outlook
items.description: Worries over the impact of generative AI on software business models are overblown, according to Morgan Stanley, which upgraded ServiceNow stock.

items.title: CFO of $320 billion software firm: AI will help us ‘afford to have less people’ but if we do it wrong, it will be a ‘catastrophe’
items.description: SAP’s C-suite admits that AI could significantly slash its 110,000-strong workforce—and its CFO says he 'will be brutal' in the process.

items.title: 3 days left: Don’t miss your last chance to lock $668 of savings for TechCrunch Disrupt 2025
items.description: There’s no event quite like TechCrunch Disrupt, and if you’ve never been, this is the year to change that. You have just 3 days left to save up to $668 on your pass.

items.title: Salesforce (CRM) Price Target Raised as AI Growth and Buybacks Impress Analysts
items.description: Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) ranks among the hot stocks to invest in right now. With a price target of $305, BNP Paribas Exane reaffirmed its Outperform rating on Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) on September 4. According to the firm, Salesforce doubled the number of paying Agentforce customers from the previous quarter, adding 2,000 more per quarter, from […]
